description: Legal jottings in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100–1138 CE). Mentions names including al-Fuqqāʿī, Abū l-Ḥasan, and Adam(?) b. Nuʿmān ha-Kohen. Mentions a period of 5 months and a clause about "whichever of them seeks separation," suggesting these are notes for a partnership agreement. There is also text on verso but too fragmented to get much out of. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
